zh.lifeSummary: 當Rebecca Marvin於1639年10月出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德時，她的父親Matthew Marvin11636歲，母親Elizabeth36歲。她於1664年與John Clarke在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和11個女兒的父母。她去世於1712年1月23日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德法明頓享年72歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦劍橋大學默里 倫敦安希特 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rebecca Marvin于1639年10月出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德时，她的父亲Matthew Marvin11636岁，母亲Elizabeth36岁。她于1664年与John Clarke在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和11个女儿的父母。她去世于1712年1月23日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德法明頓享年72岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦劍橋大學默里 倫敦安希特 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Marvin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Leicestershire and Lincolnshire): from the Middle English personal name Merefin, Merevin, Old English Merefin. This is probably formed with Old English mere ‘sea’ + Finn (a personal name derived from the ethnic name). Alternatively, it may be a borrowing of an unrecorded Old Norse name Møra-Finnr.
Slovenian: nickname from marvin, the name of a tart light red wine.

variants.name: Murfin
meanings: English (Derbyshire): probably from the Middle English personal name Mer(e)fin; see Marvin .

History: The first Murfins in North America were Nottinghamshire Quakers. Robert and Ann Murfin and their daughter Mary sailed from Hull, England, in 1678 on the ship Shield of Stockton and settled at Chesterfield, near Burlington, NJ.

nameMeanings.name: Rebecca
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, from the Latin form of the Hebrew name Rebekah, borne by the wife of Isaac, who was the mother of Esau and Jacob (Genesis 24–27). The Hebrew root occurs in the Bible only in the vocabulary word marbek ‘cattle stall’, and its connection with the name is doubtful. In any case, Rebecca was Aramean, and the name probably has a source in Aramaic. It has always been common as a Jewish name; in England and elsewhere it began to be used also by Christians from the 14th century onwards and especially at the time of the Reformation, when Old Testament names became popular. It was very common among the Puritans in the 17th century, and has enjoyed a tremendous vogue in England since the latter part of the 20th century, among people of many different creeds. In Scotland this is found as an Anglicized form of Beathag .

historicEvents.description: """Farmington was originally inhabited by the Tunxis Indian tribe. In June of 1640, a community of English immigrants was established by residents of Hartford, making Farmington the oldest inland settlement west of the Connecticut River and the twelfth oldest community in the state."" Wikipedia"

en.lifeSummary: When Rebecca Marvin was born in October 1639, in Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Matthew Marvin, was 11636 and her mother, Elizabeth, was 36. She married John Clarke in 1664, in Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 11 daughters. She died on 23 January 1712, in Farmington, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 72, and was buried in Ancient Cemetery, New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rebecca Marvin est née en octobre 1639, à Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Matthew Marvin, avait 11636 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé John Clarke en 1664, à Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 11 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 janvier 1712, à Farmington, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterrée à Ancient Cemetery, New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

Sie hat 1664 in Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America John Clarke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 11 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. Januar 1712 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Farmington, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Ancient Cemetery, New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rebecca Marvin è nata il nel ottobre 1639 nel Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Matthew Marvin, aveva 11636 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato John Clarke nel 1664, nel Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 11 figlie. Morì il 23 gennaio 1712, nel Farmington, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolta a Ancient Cemetery, New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Rebecca Marvinが1639年10月にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードで生まれた時，父Matthew Marvinは11636歳，母Elizabethは36歳であった。1664年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードハートフォードでJohn Clarkeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と11人の娘の親であった。彼女は1712年1月23日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードファルミントンで72歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ロンドンニュー ロンドンアンシエント セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rebecca Marvin(이)가 1639년 10월 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Matthew Marvin(은)는 11636세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1664년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 하트퍼드에서 John Clarke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1712년 1월 23일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 패밍턴에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 뉴 런던 앤시트 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rebecca Marvin nasceu em outubro de 1639, em Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, seu pai, Matthew Marvin, tinha 11636 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com John Clarke em 1664, em Hartford, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 11 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de janeiro de 1712, em Farmington, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 72 anos, e foi sepultada em Ancient Cemetery, New London, New London, Conecticute, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rebecca Marvin родилась октябрь 1639 г. в местности хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Matthew Marvin было 11636 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Clarke в 1664 г. в местности хартфорд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 11 дочерей. Она умерла 23 января 1712 г. в местности фармингтон, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 72 лет и была похоронена в местности ансиент кеметири, ню лондон, ню лондон, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rebecca Marvin nació en octubre de 1639, en Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Matthew Marvin, tenía 11636 años y su mamá, Elizabeth, tenía 36 años. Se casó con John Clarke en 1664, en Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 11 hijas. Murió el 23 de enero de 1712, en Farmington, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultada en Ancient Cemetery, New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.
